markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of the Storyblok CMS for managing Talon.One's blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow:** Duplicate existing posts to preserve the correct layout (`Global Riff`) and save time.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Content:** Use specific blocks for quotes (`quote page`), highlighted text (`gray box`), and images (`image with description`).](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**SEO:** Manually configure each post's SEO, including a self-referential canonical URL and the main card image for the OG image.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**CTAs:** Use hyperlinked text, optionally within a `gray box` for emphasis; dedicated CTA buttons are not available.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Topics

### Workflow & Setup

  - [**Duplication:** Always duplicate an existing post.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Why:** This preserves the correct layout (`Global Riff`), which is not applied when creating from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**General Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Author:** Select based on content type (e.g., Reza/Isabel for top-of-funnel). Reza will provide a full author list.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Published At:** Set manually; the time field is for internal reference only.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [**Categories:** Use for internal sorting; not visible on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
          - [**Primary:** `Marketing` or `Development`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
          - [**Related:** `Loyalty`, `Promotions`, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Content Formatting & Blocks

  - [**Headings:** Use the rich text editor to apply H1, H2, and H3 tags.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Gray Box:** For highlighting text (e.g., CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Path:** `Add block` → `gray box` → `rich text`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Spacing:** Set to `XS` to prevent excessive vertical space.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Quote Page:** Embeds pre-created quotes.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Path:** `Add block` → `quote page`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Source:** Quotes are stored in the `quotes` folder. Search by topic (e.g., "Omnichannel") to find relevant options.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Creation:** New quotes require a logo, quote text, headshot, name, position, and company.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Image with Description:** For images within the article body.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
      - [**Path:** `Add block` → `image with description`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
      - [**Fields:** Image file, description, and source URL (must open in a new tab).](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### SEO & Sticky Card

  - [**SEO Section:**](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Meta Title:** `[Topic] - Talon.One`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Index/Follow:** Always set to `index` and `follow`.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Structured Data:** Currently unused. GrowthX may add schema markup to improve LLM compatibility.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [**Canonical:** The full URL of the post itself.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [**Image OG:** The same image used for the main card.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**Sticky Card:** The fixed sidebar on the right.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Every post must include one.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Path:** `Add block` → `sticky card`](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Content:** Typically promotes a gated report.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
          - [**Headline:** Report title](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
          - [**Image:** Report cover mockup](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
          - [**Link:** URL to the report's download page](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Reza:** Provide the author list with corresponding content types.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Duplicate existing posts to maintain the correct layout.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [Use hyperlinked text for CTAs; dedicated buttons are not available.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [Stage content for review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/8ajsNTpnoab1ZsRJieCK-dCAUz7hxyJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
